title: Harvard Growth Lab Atlas — Total Trade by Country (country-year aggregates, all product classifications)
source_org: Harvard Growth Lab, Harvard Kennedy School
time_coverage: HS92 & SITC: 1995-2024 (SITC extends conceptually to 1962 but this Atlas cut is 1995-2024); HS12: 2012-2024; HS22: 2022-2024; services: 1995-2024 (varies)
license_terms: Harvard Dataverse — DOIs 10.7910/DVN/T4CHWJ (HS92), 10.7910/DVN/YAVJDF (HS12), 10.7910/DVN/FTUUJU (HS22), 10.7910/DVN/H8SFD2 (SITC), 10.7910/DVN/NDDMSN (services) — cite per Atlas citation guidelines
notes: Country-year total trade (no product or partner breakdown) for all 5 Atlas classification systems. These are the 'Total Trade by Country' rows from the Atlas downloads catalog (productLevel=null). Deliberately SKIPPED per task instructions: 'Country Trade by Partner' (bilateral country-country-year, 3.3MB-45.8MB, still no product breakdown, could be added later if needed) and all 'Country/Country Trade by Partner and Product' files, which are full product-level matrices ranging from 327MB to 5.6GB each (multiple far exceed the 500MB cap) — none of those were downloaded. File catalog with exact sizes obtained via https://atlas.hks.harvard.edu/api/graphql (see complexity-rankings manifest for query used).
